label: The Lattice Armory
description: The Lattice Armory occupies a narrow bay cut between prismatic buttresses, its façade scored with angle-marked grooves that align the entryway to the city’s meridian glare. Display walls of dark crystalline slats hold weapons in strict geometric sequences, their edges honed to mirror the disciplined bands of radiance that cross Kharion Meridian Confluence. A recessed measuring dais of etched glass dominates the interior, its gridlines calibrated for balance, draw length, and angle of strike rather than ornament. Light is admitted through slit apertures that separate illumination into fixed color planes, keeping the shop’s inventory legible even across intervals of absolute shadow.
